title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills · Protocol Recall
summary: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a distributable skill plugin after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose repository, user, admin, or system scope according to ownership and audience.
Inspect source, scripts, dependencies, and permissions before installing a skill.
Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for agent ext distribution that tests this competency: Define ownership, approval, updates, disablement, and deprecation for shared skills.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

options.text: The Governance record says a distributable skill plugin looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

steps.title: Record what required effort

steps.why: Retrieving Governance through the concrete a distributable skill plugin case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define ownership, approval, updates, disablement, and deprecation for shared skills.
